untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic MA length selection based on timeframe context ([THRESHOLD_NEEDED] is a placeholder). MA slope confirmation over N bars requires rate-of-change calculation not directly available in indicator set. Implementation requires external parameter configuration or a momentum indicator (e.g., MACD) as proxy for MA slope. The rule is conceptually sound but cannot be fully encoded without parameterization logic or slope detection operators.
translation_notes: Translated using sma_50 as a standard intermediate-term MA. Entry requires price crossing above MA with positive slope (approximated by MA > prev_close). Exit on crossbelow. Signal architecture is adaptive and requires backtester to accept MA_LENGTH as an optimization parameter rather than a fixed value. Consider using MACD or ADX_14 in production to detect trend strength and slope direction.
